title: The Last Tourist
overview: Travel is at a tipping point. From Carribean beaches to remote villages in Kenya, forgotten voices reveal the real conditions and consequences of one of the largest industries in the world. The role of the modern tourist is on trial.

trailers.title: The Last Tourist (2021) | Trailer | Coming to theatres April
